issue_summary: * Added density functions to remaining continuous distributions (F, T, Weibull, Cauchy). * Deprecated HasDensity interface. * Added density tests. * Made Brent Solver (inverse cum) absolute accuracy configurable for all continuous distributions.
javadoc_after:
